About Organization

The MPESB is a government organization responsible for conducting admission tests for various courses in Madhya Pradesh, India.

For more information, please visit the MPESB official website.

About the Programme

The MPESB ADDET 2026 is an admission test for Animal Husbandry and Dairy Technology courses in Madhya Pradesh, India.

The test is conducted to select eligible candidates for admission to various colleges and universities in the state.
